inputs.webinar_topic: From Manual to Autonomous: How to Build an AI-Powered Sales Pipeline in 30 Days Without Writing Code. Live demonstration of automating lead scoring, outreach personalization, and follow-up sequences.
inputs.target_audience: B2B SaaS founders and operations leaders at companies with 10-200 employees who are spending more than 15 hours per week on manual sales processes and want to scale without hiring additional SDRs
